steps.title: Focus on the difference
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between Harriet Delaney and Nora Whitcomb. The notes show Delaney served from 1832 to 1862, while Whitcomb served from 1904 to 1920, so the useful contrast is the century in which each worked.

steps.title: Reject noncomparisons
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes what the two lighthouse keepers had in common. Choice B mentions only Delaney. Choice D mentions only Whitcomb. Choices A, B, and D do not directly contrast the two keepers. The answer is C.
